---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a behavior, with the proof it would need
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed change
What should Bebop do differently?

## Verification (Verified-by-Math)
How would we prove it works — the RED case (must fail on bad input) and GREEN case (must pass on good input)?

## Scope / red-line check
Does this touch auth, money, RLS, migrations, or bulk edits? (Those need explicit human sign-off.)
